Within Table 1, the CCW team provides the 2017 Medicare prevalence rates for the 27 CCW, the 30 CCW, and the 
difference in prevalence rates. The CCW team depicts the difference in the two sets of algorithms two ways: first as a 
difference in prevalence rates (30 CCW prevalence minus 27 CCW prevalence) and second as a percentage change in
